# AI-Assisted Analysis and Reporting {#ai-analysis-reporting}

:::cdi-message
- **ID:** AI-009
- **Type:** Applied Chapter
- **Audience:** Data analysts and report writers
- **Theme:** AI can accelerate analysis communication when results remain reproducible
:::


AI can help explain results, draft reports, create summaries, and convert technical outputs into audience-specific communication.

However, the underlying analysis should remain reproducible.

A CDI workflow keeps analysis outputs separate from AI-generated interpretation.

## Recommended Separation

```text
Data analysis scripts
  -> tidy result tables
  -> visualizations
  -> AI-assisted explanation draft
  -> human review
  -> final report
```
